name: Speed of Sound Calculator
description: Estimate the speed of sound based on air temperature.
formulaDescription: Speed of sound is computed from air temperature assuming standard dry air (γ=1.4, R=287.058 J/kg·K).

example.explanation: At 15°C, the speed of sound in air is approximately 340 m/s.

faqs.question: Does air temperature affect the speed of sound?
faqs.answer: Yes. The speed of sound increases with temperature because warmer air is less dense.
